name: Rewind Lite
description: AirJelly-inspired workspace rewind digest for CodeSurf. Summarises git state, canvas shape, recent commits, and project metadata into a compact tile.
author: contex

chatSurfaces.label: Rewind Digest
chatSurfaces.description: Generate and attach a workspace rewind digest from the extension backend.

actions.name: refresh
actions.description: Refresh the Rewind Lite snapshot for the current workspace.

actions.name: getDigest
actions.description: Return the latest markdown digest for the current workspace.

mcpTools.name: rewind_lite_digest
mcpTools.description: Return a concise workspace rewind digest. Params: { workspacePath: string, workspaceId?: string, commitLimit?: number }
